{{CargoRelic
|name=Tesla Coil
|rank=AAA
|affct=TECH
|birthday=01-31
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF), Tool Chest (1.5%), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On Jan 31, 1891, Tesla invented a resonant transformer. 

The Tesla Coil consists of 2 sets of coupled resonance circuits. He conducted a large number of coil configuration tests before finding the electric power that has ultra-high voltage, low current, and high frequency AC power. This technology can be widely used in electrical lighting, fluorescence spectroscopy, high-frequency AC current, and also in radio transmission.

[Types of electric coils]

1. Spark gap coil<br>2. Solid-state coil<br>3. Solid-state coil with horn-break switch<br>4. Dual-resonance coil<br>5. Offline coil
|fame=42
|art=45
|fth=39
|civ=44
|tech=73
|ss1=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +3%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -1.8%
|ss2=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +4%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -2.4%
|ss3=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +5%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -3%
|ss4=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +7%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -4.2%
|ss5=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +9%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -5.4%
|ss7=Mecha Minion Cloning SPD +9%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -5.4%<br>Mecha Gene Research B-tad Cost -4.2% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]] Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, TECH Checks -10
|skill2=[[File:Yamato skill II.png|50px]] Place in Yamato Museum: In Yamato, B-tads gained -7.5% 
}}

[[Category:Mecha Minion Cloning Speed Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Gene Cost Reduction]]
[[Category:Yamato Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Yamato Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration B-tad Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Lottery Bead Color Change]]
[[Category:Keyboard Warrior Boost]]
